description: Now that AI agents are writing our code, is comprehension debt the new technical debt? Speed can mask the gap between what exists and what you understand. The loop shipped the fix, that does not mean you know how it works. Build the loop like someone who intends to stay the engineer and not ...
title: Loop Engineering Playbook. Where loops live, how to run your first… | by Cobus Greyling | Jun, 2026 | Medium
